pr.title: Convert some simple .s files to .c, match more of FObj, remove some incbin to deal with pointers
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Converted several small runtime/MSL assembly files into C, moved __mem into src/runtime, expanded source/include search paths, matched or partially integrated more SysDolphin FObj code, and replaced selected data incbins with explicit pointer/data declarations so symbols could be referenced directly. The PR also renamed formerly address-based calls in assembly to known symbols such as srand, rand, HSD_FObjSetState, and HSD_FObjGetState.
what_changed: Deleted asm/rand.s and replaced it with src/MSL/rand.c plus src/MSL/rand.h. The implementation exposes srand(u32 seed) and rand(void), using lbl_804D5B50 as the global seed and the standard linear congruential update seed * 1103515245 + 12345, returning (seed >> 16) & 0x7FFF.
Deleted asm/critical_regions.gamecube.s and replaced it with src/MSL/PPC_EABI/critical_regions.gamecube.c containing a no-op __kill_critical_regions function.

Deleted asm/__init_cpp_exceptions.s and replaced it with src/runtime/__init_cpp_exceptions.c. GetR2 and __init_cpp_exceptions remained inline asm, while __fini_cpp_exceptions was expressed in C. A comment notes __init_cpp_exceptions was left as asm because lbl_80005918 is in extabindex and caused an incompatible-section error.
Renamed src/__mem.c and src/__mem.h into src/runtime/__mem.c and src/runtime/__mem.h with 100% similarity, and updated obj_files.mk linker paths accordingly.
Updated Makefile SRC_DIRS from only src and src/sysdolphin to include src/msl, src/msl/ppc_eabi, src/runtime, and src/sysdolphin. INCLUDES was similarly expanded for new source subdirectories.
Updated obj_files.mk to link new C object paths instead of assembly objects for __init_cpp_exceptions, critical_regions.gamecube, rand, and the moved __mem object.
In asm/CARD.s, changed calls from func_803257BC and func_803257C4 to the newly identified srand and rand symbols.

In asm/fobj_asm.s, removed the assembly bodies for HSD_FObjRemoveAll, func_8036AA44, and func_8036AA64 from the standalone asm file, and relabeled remaining calls to func_8036AA44/func_8036AA64 as HSD_FObjSetState/HSD_FObjGetState.
In src/sysdolphin/fobj.c, added HSD_FObjRemoveAll with a NON_MATCHING C version and a matching inline-asm fallback. Also simplified HSD_FObjRemove's null check from fobj == NULL to !fobj.

Expanded asm/data.s by replacing incbin ranges near lbl_804003A0/lbl_80400430 with explicit .4byte, .byte, .balign, and global label declarations, including references to __read_console, __write_console, func_80325F18, and self-referential labels such as lbl_8040043C, lbl_80400484, and lbl_804004CC.
smart_moves: Kept linker order stable by replacing object paths in obj_files.mk rather than only adding new source files. This is important for decomp work where matching depends on exact section/object ordering.
Moved small, simple library/runtime routines out of raw assembly first. rand, srand, and __kill_critical_regions were straightforward wins that reduced asm surface area with low matching risk.
Used explicit data declarations in asm/data.s instead of opaque incbins so pointer references to runtime console I/O functions and self-referential structures could resolve by symbol.

Preserved hard-to-match or section-sensitive routines as inline asm inside C files. __init_cpp_exceptions stayed inline asm due to the extabindex section issue, and HSD_FObjRemoveAll had a NON_MATCHING C attempt guarded by a matching asm fallback.
Renamed call sites in existing assembly to meaningful symbols once C replacements existed, making later decompilation and cross-reference work easier without changing behavior.
decomp_lessons: When an asm function is simple and has known library semantics, convert it to C and immediately update assembly call sites to the canonical function names; this improves symbol knowledge across the project.
Removing incbins is not just cleanup: explicit .4byte pointer entries allow the linker and future C code to refer to actual symbols rather than anonymous blob offsets.
For section-sensitive runtime code, partial C conversion is acceptable. A file can contain C functions plus inline asm for routines blocked by extab/extabindex or small-data relocation constraints.
Build-system updates must accompany directory reorganizations. Adding src/msl, src/msl/ppc_eabi, and src/runtime to SRC_DIRS/INCLUDES and updating obj_files.mk kept the new source layout linkable.
NON_MATCHING blocks can document the intended C structure while retaining an inline asm implementation for the matching build.
naming_conventions: MSL random functions were promoted from func_803257BC/func_803257C4 to standard names srand and rand.
FObj state helpers were promoted from func_8036AA44 and func_8036AA64 to HSD_FObjSetState and HSD_FObjGetState.

Runtime source files were grouped under src/runtime, while MSL/PPC_EABI files used src/MSL and src/MSL/PPC_EABI paths in the diff; the Makefile excerpt added lowercase src/msl and src/msl/ppc_eabi search paths, reflecting a case/path convention issue worth checking on case-sensitive systems.
Remaining unknown data labels stayed address-style, such as lbl_8040043C, lbl_80400484, lbl_804004CC, and lbl_804D5B50, rather than being over-named without strong evidence.
SysDolphin object functions use HSD_FObj-prefixed names, e.g. HSD_FObjRemoveAll, HSD_FObjRemove, HSD_FObjFree, HSD_FObjSetState, and HSD_FObjGetState.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted leaf/no-op assembly __kill_critical_regions to a trivial C function returning immediately.
Converted rand.s to C by preserving the exact LCG constants 1103515245 and 12345 and the return mask 0x7FFF, matching the original rlwinm-based behavior.
Used inline asm with nofralloc for GetR2 and __init_cpp_exceptions to preserve exact prologue/epilogue and small-data/register behavior.
Kept HSD_FObjRemoveAll's exact assembly under the matching path while retaining a NON_MATCHING C reconstruction for readability and future matching attempts.
Replaced anonymous incbin bytes with aligned scalar directives and symbol pointers, including explicit NULL entries, .byte fields, self-pointers, and function pointers.
Updated assembly branch comments/call operands to known function names without otherwise decompiling the surrounding CARD.s and fobj_asm.s code.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
The only explicit rationale in the diff is a source comment explaining that __init_cpp_exceptions was left as asm because lbl_80005918 is in extabindex and caused an incompatible-section error.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully match HSD_FObjRemoveAll without inline asm or NON_MATCHING.
Search for later cleanup of src/MSL versus src/msl path casing in Makefile and obj_files.mk.
Find PRs that name the lbl_8040043C/lbl_80400484/lbl_804004CC data structures around console I/O.
Search for later handling of extabindex symbols and __init_cpp_exceptions without inline asm.
Find later PRs that replace more MSL assembly files with C implementations.
